experiences.description: Worked on website development and organizational activities. Developed frontend interfaces for web applications. Improved website responsiveness and user experience. Assisted in office documentation and project coordination activities.

Worked on the development of BhojanVilla, a restaurant and resort management platform. Developed web application modules using Python and Django. Worked on frontend and backend integration. Implemented user authentication and booking functionalities. Assisted in database integration and system testing.

projects.title: DocMind AI – Intelligent Document Assistant (Ongoing)
projects.description: Developing an AI-powered document assistant capable of extracting information from PDF documents and answering user queries using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques. Utilizes semantic search and vector-based retrieval to provide context-aware responses from uploaded documents. Key Features: PDF Upload & Processing, Semantic Search, Context-Aware Question Answering, Document Knowledge Retrieval, AI-Powered Responses
projects.technologies: Python, FastAPI, LangChain, Gemini API, FAISS

projects.title: StellarSence VR – Virtual Reality Space Education Platform
